# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the service principal"
      }
    },
    "roleDefinitionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b2a7b960-3d5e-48e4-a338-bf870c4178f4')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The role definition ID for the Contributor role"
      }
    },
    "subscriptionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The subscription ID where the service principal will be created"
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.AAD/sp",
      "apiVersion": "2018-06-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]",
      "properties": {
        "appId": null,
        "password": null
      },
      "dependsOn": []
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(parameters('subscriptionId'), parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]",
      "properties": {
        "scope": "/subscriptions/[parameters('subscriptionId')]",
        "roleDefinitionId": "[parameters('roleDefinitionId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(concat('Microsoft.AAD/sp/', parameters('servicePrincipalName')), '2018-06-01-preview', 'full').objectId]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.AAD/sp', parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
